title: bridge-teams uses local constant_time_eq instead of subtle crate used elsewhere
description: bridge-teams/src/teams.rs defines a private constant_time_eq() function using fold/XOR rather than using the subtle::ConstantTimeEq trait already used in bridge-matrix, daemon, and other crates. The local implementation is functionally equivalent but creates a maintenance split: subtle is the project standard, and the local function does not benefit from subtle's compile-time protections against optimizer reordering. Suggested fix: add subtle as a dependency and use ConstantTimeEq::ct_eq as bridge-matrix does.
